clips.title: 美国在菲律宾的水刑与焚村

lines.en: It should be the earnest wish and paramount aim of the military administration
lines.zh: 军方的首要目标和真心愿望应该是

lines.en: to win the confidence, respect, and affection of the inhabitants of the Philippines.
lines.zh: 赢得菲律宾居民的信任、尊重和好感。

lines.en: President William McKinley.
lines.zh: 总统威廉·麦金莱。

lines.en: In February 1899, Filipinos began a new fight for independence.
lines.zh: 1899年2月，菲律宾人开始新的独立斗争。

lines.en: This time against the United States.
lines.zh: 这次是对抗美国。

lines.en: You know, you can imagine the dashed hopes of people who'd been fighting for independence.
lines.zh: 你可以想象，那些一直为独立而战的人希望破灭的心情。

lines.en: Suddenly you have to realize they have to do it again.
lines.zh: 突然他们意识到还得再来一次。

lines.en: And they do do it again.
lines.zh: 而他们确实又干了。

lines.en: This is Daniel Imarvar.
lines.zh: 我是丹尼尔·伊马尔瓦。

lines.en: I wrote a book called How to Hide an Empire, a History of the Greater United States.
lines.zh: 我写了一本书，叫《如何隐藏一个帝国：大美国的历史》。

lines.en: He's a history professor at Northwestern University.
lines.zh: 他是西北大学的历史教授。

lines.en: And it becomes a war that just consumes so many lives.
lines.zh: 这场战争吞噬了无数生命。

lines.en: I hope that when they are conquered, they will be made to see for many years
lines.zh: 我希望他们被征服后，能被迫认清很多年

lines.en: the iron hand of military rule, the only kind for which they are suited.
lines.zh: 只有铁腕的军管才适合他们。

lines.en: The United States is burning villages.
lines.zh: 美国在烧村子。

lines.en: U.S.
lines.zh: 美国

lines.en: forces are concentrating people in camps or garrison towns
lines.zh: 军队把人集中到营地或驻军城镇

lines.en: where they're cut off from food supplies.
lines.zh: 在那里他们被切断了粮食供应。

lines.en: It's torturing people with a kind of water-based torture
lines.zh: 他们用一种跟水有关的酷刑折磨人

lines.en: that bears a discomforting resemblance to waterboarding today.
lines.zh: 跟现在的水刑很像，让人很不舒服。

lines.en: Back then it was called the water cure, where dirty water was put into insurgents' mouths
lines.zh: 那时候叫水刑，就是把脏水灌进叛乱分子的嘴里

lines.en: or suspected mouths until they just sort of couldn't take it anymore
lines.zh: 或者怀疑的人嘴里，直到他们实在受不了为止

clips.title: AI不是魔法也不是终结者

source.episode: Will AI destroy us... or save us?

lines.en: Most of us, when we hear the term AI, we think about Hollywood.
lines.zh: 大多数人一听到人工智能，就想到好莱坞。

lines.en: Why do you cry?
lines.zh: 你为什么哭？

lines.en: You mean people?
lines.zh: 你是指人类吗？

lines.en: Yeah.
lines.zh: 嗯。

lines.en: I don't know.
lines.zh: 我不知道。

lines.en: We just cry.
lines.zh: 我们就是会哭。

lines.en: We think about the Terminator.
lines.zh: 我们会想到《终结者》。

lines.en: We think about Ex Machina.
lines.zh: 我们会想到《机械姬》。

lines.en: You programmed her to flirt with me.
lines.zh: 你是故意让她跟我调情的。

lines.en: If I did, would that be cheating?
lines.zh: 如果我这么做，那算作弊吗？

lines.en: Wouldn't it?
lines.zh: 不是吗？

lines.en: We think about Star Trek.
lines.zh: 我们会想到《星际迷航》。

lines.en: Please state the nature of the medical emergency.
lines.zh: 请说明是什么医疗急症。

lines.en: Or maybe Star Wars.
lines.zh: 或者可能是《星球大战》。

lines.en: Hollywood is so deeply embedded in our brains.
lines.zh: 好莱坞已经深深刻在我们脑子里了。

lines.en: I'll be back.
lines.zh: 我会回来的。

lines.en: What does AI actually mean, you know?
lines.zh: 你知道，AI到底是什么意思？

lines.en: Really mean.
lines.zh: 真正的意思。

lines.en: AI is not a magic wand, but it's not a Terminator.
lines.zh: AI不是魔法棒，也不是终结者。

lines.en: The system learns by accessing data.
lines.zh: 这个系统是通过获取数据来学习的。

lines.en: AI is not a harbinger of utopia or dystopia.
lines.zh: AI不是乌托邦或反乌托邦的预兆。

lines.en: And it changes its configuration in order to be able to predict stuff.
lines.zh: 它会调整自己的结构来预测东西。

lines.en: AI is something invented by us to advance our progress.
lines.zh: AI是我们发明来推动进步的东西。

lines.en: It's really complicated, beautiful math, but it is fundamentally just math.
lines.zh: 它是很复杂又漂亮的数学，但本质上就是数学。

lines.en: AI is deeply entangled with our desire to be in control,
lines.zh: AI和我们想掌控的欲望紧密相连，

lines.en: both of ourselves and the world around us.
lines.zh: 既想掌控自己，也想掌控周围的世界。

lines.en: To control human behavior, to control the future,
lines.zh: 掌控人的行为，掌控未来，

lines.en: to control environmental outcomes, to control institutions and societies.
lines.zh: 掌控环境结果，掌控机构和社会。

lines.en: AI is already here.
lines.zh: AI已经存在了。

clips.title: 海峡封锁如何瘫痪全球供应链

source.episode: It’s Not Just Oil. War in Iran Will Hike the Price of Nearly Everything You Buy

lines.en: been chronicling how the conflict in the Gulf
lines.zh: 一直在记录海湾冲突的情况

lines.en: has been disrupting a wider array of raw materials and consumer goods,
lines.zh: 它扰乱了更多原材料和消费品的供应

lines.en: with potential longer-term and worldwide ripple effects.
lines.zh: 可能会带来长期、全球性的连锁反应

lines.en: I always like to say that one of the things that Odd Lots tends to do well
lines.zh: 我常说，Odd Lots 有个优势

lines.en: is we uncover the supply chains when they're affected,
lines.zh: 就是能挖出受影响的供应链

lines.en: and right now is kind of like a bull market in supply chain shocks, right?
lines.zh: 现在就像是供应链冲击的牛市，对吧？

lines.en: I think one thing to understand about our current moment in the petrochemicals
lines.zh: 我觉得要理解现在石化行业的情况

lines.en: and also broader energy space is that this is the scenario that people were worried about for years.
lines.zh: 还有更广泛能源领域，这正是人们多年来担心的局面

lines.en: This is the thought experiment that used to dominate bar talk for oil traders in London.
lines.zh: 这就是以前伦敦油商酒吧里常聊的假设情景

lines.en: What if the Strait of Hormuz was closed?
lines.zh: 如果霍尔木兹海峡被封了会怎样？

lines.en: What if the Strait of Hormuz was closed?
lines.zh: 如果霍尔木兹海峡被封了会怎样？

lines.en: And now we're actually experiencing it, and so now we're getting a much fuller understanding
lines.zh: 现在我们真的遇到了，所以理解就更全面了

lines.en: of exactly how all of that energy, all those carbons or whatever,
lines.zh: 到底这些能源、这些碳之类的

lines.en: actually routes throughout the entire world.
lines.zh: 是怎么流向全世界的

lines.en: Thanks to the brilliance of sort of advanced chemistry,
lines.zh: 多亏了先进化学的聪明设计

lines.en: everything can be kind of everything else.
lines.zh: 几乎什么都能变成别的东西

lines.en: In some sense, you turn oil into plastic.
lines.zh: 比如说，把石油变成塑料
